Somewhere along the way, someone's gonna be in front of you saying, that's ridiculous, that's not gonna work. How do you deal with those people? The dream stompers I call them, right? The doubting Thomas' the naysayers, they're always out there. And it's very interesting because I'm a big believer in removing the dream stompers from my life and you're moving them from your life and you're moving them from your life, right? Is to get those doubting Thomas' out of your life as soon as quickly as possible. That being said, very often we can't because those people might be part of our family. They might even be our spouses or our girlfriends or our parents. You can't actually remove them. So here's the trick. It's really a two-part trick. Part one is that you go to the person who's, you know, you can't get rid of in your life. Well, let me back up. If you can get rid of them, get rid of them. If there's people who are your dream stompers and they're telling you you can't achieve and you're not meant for greatness, I would just honestly ex those people off my roll decks, delete them from my phone, get them out of my email and just I would lose their numbers. And I would surround myself, I choose to surround myself with people who believe in me, people who want to empower me, people who are really living the same type of high quality, you know, high purpose life that I am. Those are the people I want to surround myself with, right? But if they happen to be your wife or your parents, right, what I would say is go to them and say, listen, you know, I'm working really hard on something. I'm, you know, going in a great direction and, you know, I understand you might not really believe in it yet and you might not buy into it yet, but just do me a favor. For the next 90 days, every time you're about to say something negative to me, just don't. Just write it down and save it. And on the 91st day, you can destroy me. Just give me 90 days. Because, and here's why. Because what happens is this, at this point, I could be around all the doubting Thomas's I want and no one's going to shake my belief in myself and my vision for my future and where I'm going. Because I have so many anchor experiences telling me that, yeah, I'm right. I'm on path. This is good. So I'm very certain about my, about my path in life. In the beginning, when you're not that certain, just over to this point, you start getting some real successes. No one can shake you. Then you actually, the one that you can turn the doubting Thomas, you can turn the dream stomper into a positive person. And then you're giving them a huge gift. So I say, try to, if you can't get them out permanently, if they're in your family or your spouse, whatever, you at least try to silence them temporarily. Tell them to write it all down and kill you on the 91st day. But hopefully by that 91st day, you've already achieved some success. You have something to show them. They'll essentially offset and block them from being able to essentially negatively influence you. So that's what I do.
